policy.ordinaryManDuplicatePolicy: Prefer the complete 24-bit/48 kHz source; retain the one-track 16-bit source as blocked duplicate evidence.
policy.multiDiscPolicy: Keep Essential discs separate as distinct destination album names; block incomplete LIVE & LOUD.

blocked.reason: Only two source tracks are present; the source package is incomplete and must not be organized as a partial album.
One-track lower-quality duplicate of the complete 24-bit/48 kHz Ordinary Man candidate.

metadataNotes: The Blizzard Of Ozz workflow contains one Randy Rhoads artist tag; keep albumartist as the folder strategy.
The complete Ordinary Man workflow contains one Post Malone artist tag; keep albumartist as the folder strategy.
Titles are populated in all audited workflows; no metadata manifest is required unless a real-destination dry-run exposes a collision or missing title.
The two Essential disc workflows require staged album-name overrides before organization so their destinations remain collision-free.
